components.name: Motion
components.description: The three-spring motion system — fast/moderate/slow with one-tier-faster exits. All timing lives in @/lib/springs (framer-motion tokens) and is mirrored as --motion-* CSS vars + .overlay-motion-* helpers for Radix overlays. Slow in, faster out: every exit runs a tier quicker and drops the bounce.

components.name: Scrolling List
components.description: The scrolling-list edge-cue system. useScrollEdges observes a scroller and reports which edges have more content; ScrollEdgeCue renders a surface-aware gradient + chevron at those edges; ScrollArea composes both with a restyled overlay scrollbar and a native fallback on touch. Signals overflow so a clipped list never looks finished.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact label for status, counts, and metadata. Six variants on the C2 dark surface — translucent fills and layered rings, no hard borders.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: White ring when the badge is a focusable link.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface treatment.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render styling onto a child element (Radix Slot) — e.g. an anchor.

props.name: className
props.description: Class overrides merged via cn().

components.name: NewUpdatesPill
components.description: Floating pill that surfaces new incoming detections above the list.

components.name: Button
components.description: The base button primitive — the father of the button family. Owns the variant + size token system rendered in the C2 design (layered white opacities, oklch destructive). ActionButton, SplitActionButton, and CameraToggleButton are presets/composites built on it.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Inset white ring for keyboard nav.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface treatment. Destructive uses oklch.

props.name: size
props.description: Height + type scale; icon is a square slot.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render styling onto a child element (Radix Slot) for links/polymorphism.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive, dimmed to 45%.

props.name: className
props.description: Class overrides merged via cn().

components.name: ActionButton
components.description: A preset of Button with the legacy action-button handoff stamp. Kept for back-compat across card action rows and toolbars; prefer Button in new code.

components.name: SplitActionButton
components.description: Two-segment composite: a primary Button action plus a dropdown menu of sub-options. Shares the base Button's variant + size tokens. Used for effector controls.

components.name: CameraToggleButton
components.description: Single on/off camera control built on Button. Off invites "point the camera"; pressing slews (pending) and settles into a brighter pressed state.

components.name: CopyButton
components.description: Quiet, hover-revealed icon button that copies a single value to the clipboard.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, built on Radix. Each item animates its height open and closed; type single/multiple controls how many can be open.

states.label: Open
states.note: Body expands with the accordion-down height animation; chevron rotates 180deg.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Ring on the trigger for keyboard nav.

states.label: Disabled
states.note: 50% opacity, pointer-events none on the item trigger.

props.name: type
props.description: Single allows one open item; multiple allows many.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Single-type only: lets the open item close again.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open item(s). Array when type is multiple.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled open item(s).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires when the open item(s) change.

props.name: disabled
props.description: On AccordionItem: makes the item non-interactive.

props.name: className
props.description: Class overrides merged via cn(). Available on every part.

components.name: TelemetryRow
components.description: Single telemetry metric: icon, label, monospace value. Laid out in a 3-column grid that wraps by item count.

components.name: CardHeader
components.description: Top row of a TargetCard — icon, title, subtitle, status chip, badge, and chevron.

components.name: CardActions
components.description: Action bar for a TargetCard. Composes ActionButton, SplitActionButton, and the confirm pattern.

components.name: CardDetails
components.description: Collapsible telemetry accordion. Composes AccordionSection and TelemetryRow in a fixed grid.

components.name: CardSensors
components.description: Lists detecting sensors for a target with type, distance, and timestamp.

components.name: CardMedia
components.description: Image or video slot for a target surveillance feed. Supports live badge, playback, and lightbox.

components.name: CardLog
components.description: Chronological event log accordion with newest-first ordering and expand-all.

components.name: CardClosure
components.description: Outcome selection grid for closing a detection event.

components.name: TargetCard
components.description: The core card shell. Composes CardHeader with slot children via the useCardSlots hook. The single most important block in the system.

states.label: Open
states.note: Header tinted, content expands with collapsible animation.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: White ring on the trigger for keyboard nav.

props.name: header
props.description: Header row — typically a CardHeader.

props.name: children
props.description: Slot content rendered inside the collapsible body.

props.name: footer
props.description: Optional footer rendered below the body.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled expanded state.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires when the header is toggled.

props.name: completed
props.description: Desaturates + dims a resolved card.

props.name: severity
props.description: Unified urgency tier (API compat; no spine rendered).

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires on open transition for selection sync.

props.name: className
props.description: Class overrides.

components.name: FilterBar
components.description: Search input plus data-driven filter dropdowns. Pass any number of filter dimensions as a FilterDef[].

components.name: Device Card
components.description: One collapsible row per field asset, registry-driven. Health tile, primary cluster, footer actions, and overflow.

components.name: DevicesPanel
components.description: Right-hand sidebar listing connected field devices grouped by type, with search and type-filter isolation.

components.name: MapMarker
components.description: Composable tactical marker: layered surface, ring, glyph, glow, and overlays, driven by resolveMarkerStyle().
